markdown:
#  Can I delete a Sage 300 CRE cost code, cost type, or vendor from Procore? 
##  Answer 
No. Cost codes cannot be deleted in Procore or the hh2 cloud service. Instead, cost codes must always be deleted in Sage 300 CRE. Currently, there is a known limitation in the hh2 cloud service that prevents cost codes that have synced between Procore and Sage 300 CRE from being removed after deletion in Sage.
